name: Custom Observability Suite
summary: Designed and deployed a custom observability workflow to bridge Grafana alerts and engineering response.
problem: Alerting and incident routing involved manual steps that slowed response time.
solution: Built an automated notification-to-incident pipeline using Codex and Terraform.
impact: Cut down mean time to resolution

name: Server-Rendered PDP Pricing
summary: Implemented server-rendered commerce card pricing for product detail pages.
problem: Client-side pricing caused delayed price visibility on initial page load.
solution: Moved pricing logic to the server side across Java, JSP, and frontend pricing flows.
impact: Enabled immediate price visibility on page load
Preserved behavior parity across client and server systems

name: Structured Data Server-Side Migration
summary: Migrated schema implementation from client-side to server-side across a very large page footprint.
problem: Client-side schema limited structured data visibility and SEO performance.
solution: Refactored schema generation to server-side rendering across 150,000+ pages.

name: Mobile Web Performance Optimization
summary: Improved Core Web Vitals and interaction responsiveness across a large set of mobile pages.
problem: Mobile interaction performance was poor across 200,000+ pages.
solution: Refactored client-side implementation to reduce interaction latency.

name: Image Gallery Server-Side Refactor
summary: Refactored an image gallery library from client-side to server-side rendering.
problem: Client-side rendering caused slow load times on product detail pages.
solution: Moved image gallery rendering logic to the server side.
impact: Reduced load times from 5 seconds to 2 seconds

name: Social QR Web Application
summary: Led planning and implementation of a social QR web application.
solution: Built the application using Docker, MySQL, React, TailwindCSS, and Ruby on Rails.

name: Full-Stack Web Application
summary: Led development of a full-stack application spanning web and mobile technologies.
solution: Built using React, React Native, Node.js, RDS, TypeScript, and Redux.
